title: [SBW]HaloVehicles
description: This expansion pack for SBW adds Halo vehicles.
body:
This mod is in early development.

**This expansion pack for SBW adds Halo vehicles.**

It has been decided to add the following items in the upcoming update plan:

Warthog-related------[v]

Mongoose------[v]

scorpion------[v]

Pelican------[v]

Falcon------[v]

Ghost------[x]

Wraith------[x]

Chopper------[x]

More...
